data.title: M2 Capital Invests $20 Million in Ethena's Governance Token
data.description: According to PANews, M2 Capital from the United Arab Emirates has announced a $20 million investment in Ethena's governance token, ENA. Ethena's products, USDe and sUSDe, have reached a total locked value exceeding $14 billion. M2 Global Wealth plans to integrate Ethena into its wealth management services, offering clients compliant digital asset yield opportunities.

data.title: XPL will be listed on Bitget Launchpool soon. Locking BGB or XPL will unlock 2.2 million XPL.
data.description: Bitget Launchpool is about to launch the Plasma (XPL) project, with a total prize pool of 2,200,000 XPL. The staking channel will be open from 21:00 on September 25th to 21:00 on September 28th (UTC+8). This round of Launchpool has two staking pools: BGB Staking Pool Airdrop Total: 2,075,000 XPL; VIP User Staking Cap: 50,000 BGB; Regular User Staking Cap: 5,000 BGB; XPL Staking Pool Airdrop Total: 125,000 XPL; Individual Staking Cap: 1,250,000 XPL

data.title: ZachXBT: North Korean IT remote workers involved in at least 25 crypto industry hacking and ransomware attacks
data.description: Replit's CEO posted on the X platform that North Korean IT remote workers (ITWs) have generated hundreds of millions of dollars for North Korea by using AI tools to secure remote jobs in the United States. Chainalysis sleuth ZachXBT responded to this, stating that North Korean IT remote workers have been implicated in at least 25 hacking attacks or extortion attempts against crypto companies. All of the victims are in the crypto sector.

data.title: ECB targets 2029 for launch of the digital euro
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) is stepping up its plans to introduce a digital euro for the general public by 2029. The article ECB targets 2029 for launch of the digital euro was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/ecb-aims-2029-for-digital-euro-launch/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=ECB+targets+2029+for+launch+of+the+digital+euro

data.title: European Banks Collaborate on Euro Stablecoin Project Under MiCA Regulation
data.description:
According to Foresight News, nine major European banks, including ING, Banca Sella, KBC, Danske Bank, DekaBank, UniCredit, SEB, CaixaBank, and Raiffeisen Bank International, are set to launch a euro stablecoin project regulated by the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework. The initiative will be managed by a new company based in the Netherlands and overseen by the Dutch central bank.

The stablecoin is expected to be issued in the second half of 2026, aiming to provide low-cost, round-the-clock cross-border payment services. This move is intended to bolster Europe's strategic autonomy in the digital payments sector.

The consortium remains open to additional banks joining the project and plans to appoint a CEO in the near future.

data.title: Binance to Launch LIGHT Perpetual Contracts and Alpha Trading
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will launch Bitlight (LIGHT) trading on Binance Alpha at 11:00 AM (UTC) on September 27, 2025, and will also launch the LIGHTUSDT perpetual contract on Binance Futures at 11:30 AM (UTC) on the same day, supporting up to 50x leverage. This contract will be included in the new contract fee promotion and will be available for copy trading within 24 hours of launch. Additionally, Binance will offer a LIGHT token airdrop to eligible users from 11:00 AM (UTC) on September 27, 2025, to claim using Binance Alpha points on the event page. (This news flash was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: JustLend DAO TVL exceeds $8.16 billion
data.description: According to official news, JustLend DAO, TRON's leading decentralized lending protocol, has released its latest weekly report, showing that its total value locked (TVL) has surpassed $8.16 billion, its user base has exceeded 474,000, and it has distributed over $127 million in grants. As the core DeFi infrastructure of the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO will continue to drive the expansion of the decentralized finance ecosystem and provide efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: SunPerp has launched SUNDOG/USDT contract trading
data.description: SunPerp, the decentralized perpetual contract exchange within the TRON ecosystem, has officially announced the addition of a new USDT-margined contract trading pair: SUNDOG/USDT, supporting up to 20x leverage. SunPerp, the first Perp DEX within the TRON ecosystem, leverages its unique hybrid architecture, high-speed transaction matching capabilities, fully on-chain fund custody, and the industry's lowest transaction fees, aiming to seamlessly combine the streamlined experience of centralized exchanges with the asset sovereignty and transparency of decentralized finance. Currently in public beta, SunPerp boasts over 6,000 users and a total trading volume exceeding 14.6 million USDT as of September 24th.

data.title: Going for Gold: China’s Challenge to the US
data.description:
Bitcoin is emerging as a new contender for reserve status, with Deutsche Bank and other analysts forecasting that it could join gold on central bank balance sheets within the next decade. The gold market is booming, and the tectonic plates of global finance are shifting beneath our feet.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/25/going-for-gold-chinas-challenge-to-the-us/

data.title: Binance: ChainOpera AI (COAI) airdrop threshold is 200 points
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha will list ChainOpera AI (COAI) on September 25, 2025, at 3:00 PM (UTC+8). After trading begins, users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points will be eligible to claim an airdrop of 250 COAI tokens. This airdrop is available on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour while the promotion is ongoing. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha promotion page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: The IRS amends Form W-9 to strengthen digital asset compliance requirements
data.description: The U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has released a draft of the 2026 Form W-9, adding new digital asset compliance provisions that require U.S. brokers to collect and verify client Taxpayer Identification Numbers (TINs) when trading digital assets like cryptocurrencies and NFTs to enhance tax reporting. The draft also provides specific guidance for sole proprietors and disregarded entities when filling out their TINs, reducing the risk of backup withholding due to incorrect TINs. The new regulations will take effect in January 2026, requiring businesses to update their compliance processes and individuals and businesses to ensure their TIN information is accurate. (Crowdfund Insider)

data.title: Australian fitness firm tanks 21% on Solana treasury gamble
data.description:
Nasdaq-listed Fitell tanked on Wednesday after buying $10 million of Solana as part of a newly announced crypto treasury strategy.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/australian-fitness-firm-tanks-21-after-buying-solana?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fitell's Solana Acquisition Leads to Stock Decline Amid Crypto Buying Trend
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Australian fitness equipment manufacturer Fitell experienced a significant stock drop of 21% on Wednesday following its announcement of acquiring over 46,000 Solana tokens for approximately $10 million. The Nasdaq-listed company concluded Wednesday's trading session at $6.65, marking a slight increase of 0.15%, and closed the after-hours session at $6.66, as reported by Google Finance. This decline positions Fitell as the fifth company this week to face shareholder disappointment due to cryptocurrency purchases.

Earlier in the week, Helius Medical Technologies, a medical device company, saw its shares plummet by nearly 34% after investing around $175 million in Solana. Similarly, BNB treasury company CEA Industries, Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies, and Strategy Inc., the largest Bitcoin holder, experienced stock price reductions of 19.5%, 10%, and 2.5%, respectively, following recent crypto acquisitions. Fitell's transition from a fitness equipment company to a crypto treasury firm was marked by the issuance of a $100 million convertible note aimed at accumulating Solana for its treasury. The company plans to allocate 70% of the net proceeds from each transaction towards purchasing digital currencies, with the remainder supporting its crypto operations, on-chain activities, and serving as working capital.

Fitell CEO Sam Lu expressed optimism about expanding the company's Solana position, enhancing staking revenue, and driving long-term shareholder value with committed institutional support. Additionally, Fitell appointed David Swaney and Cailen Sullivan as advisers to optimize its digital asset treasury through yield-generating models and assess DeFi opportunities and associated risks. Despite these strategic moves, Fitell's shares have declined by 95.69% this year, notably plunging in February after analysts labeled the company as "overvalued and underperforming."

Meanwhile, Solana digital asset treasuries (DATs) are rapidly expanding, with companies like Solmate, Helius, and DeFi Development Corp integrating SOL into their treasuries. Last week, Brera Holdings rebranded to Solmate, aiming to establish a Solana DAT and develop infrastructure for the Solana ecosystem after securing $300 million. Neurotech company Helius Medical Technologies announced plans on September 15 to raise $500 million for its Solana DAT, closing its private placement on September 18 with an option to raise an additional $750 million, potentially totaling $1.25 billion. Currently, 17 entities hold 17.04 million Solana, representing 2.96% of Solana's total supply locked up by Solana DATs, according to Strategic SOL Reserve.

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/australia-targets-rogue-crypto-exchanges/
